commands.review_summary:
The PR splits gateway startup benchmark readiness timing into HTTP-listen and gateway-ready fields, adds startup trace details for post-bind runtime sidecars, and covers fixture/probe behavior in tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the PR proof path: current main collapses HTTP-listen and gateway-ready log timing into one readyLogMs signal, while the PR shows a real benchmark run with the split timings after the fix.
